metadata.description: Demo data for Automation Audit Dashboard - 25 automations, 3 conflicts, 1 cycle

automationInventory.name: Lead Assignment Flow
automationInventory.description: Assigns leads based on territory and round-robin

automationInventory.name: Opportunity Stage Handler
automationInventory.description: Updates related records when stage changes

automationInventory.name: Account Data Enrichment
automationInventory.description: Enriches account data from external sources

automationInventory.name: OpportunityTriggerHandler
automationInventory.description: Main trigger handler for opportunity logic

automationInventory.name: Case Escalation Flow
automationInventory.description: Escalates cases based on age and priority

automationInventory.name: Contact Welcome Email
automationInventory.description: Legacy - sends welcome email to new contacts

automationInventory.name: AccountTriggerHandler
automationInventory.description: Syncs account changes to related records

overlapWarnings.recommendation: Define clear ownership - Flow for enrichment, Trigger for sync

circularDependencies.description: Account update triggers Contact sync, which triggers Account rollup, creating potential infinite loop
circularDependencies.recommendation: Add recursion guards or consolidate logic

dependencyGraph.mermaid:
graph TD
    subgraph Lead_Automations[Lead Automations]
        LA[Lead Assignment Flow]
        LC[Lead Conversion Flow]
    end
    
    subgraph Account_Automations[Account Automations]
        AE[Account Enrichment Flow]
        AT[Account Trigger Handler]
    end
    
    subgraph Opportunity_Automations[Opportunity Automations]
        OS[Opp Stage Handler]
        OT[Opportunity Trigger]
    end
    
    subgraph Contact_Automations[Contact Automations]
        CW[Contact Welcome PB]
        CO[Contact Onboarding Flow]
    end
    
    LC --> AE
    LC --> CO
    AE --> AT
    AT --> OS
    OS --> OT
    
    style LA fill:#22C55E
    style LC fill:#22C55E
    style AE fill:#F59E0B
    style AT fill:#EF4444
    style OS fill:#F59E0B
    style OT fill:#EF4444
    style CW fill:#F59E0B
    style CO fill:#22C55E

recommendations.title: Resolve Circular Dependency
recommendations.description: Break the Account-Contact update cycle by adding recursion prevention

recommendations.title: Consolidate Opportunity Automations
recommendations.description: Merge Flow_Opp_Stage_Update logic into Trigger framework

recommendations.title: Migrate Process Builder
recommendations.description: Convert Contact Welcome Email from Process Builder to Flow

recommendations.title: Retire Workflow Rule
recommendations.description: Evaluate and migrate remaining Workflow Rule to Flow
